notes: The ihris adaptor exposes only common + re-exported @openfn/language-fhir-4 builders over a generic HTTP client (no bespoke operations), targeting an iHRIS FHIR R4 server. Authored a focused FHIR R4 OpenAPI 3.0.3 covering the health-workforce resources iHRIS uses (Practitioner, PractitionerRole, Organization, Location) plus /metadata, using standard FHIR REST interactions and the application/fhir+json media type. Resource shapes are trimmed subsets of the HL7 FHIR R4 definitions.
